_schema.description: Claude plugin reference to Codex candidate mappings. Top-level keys are '<plugin-name>@<provider>'. Each value is a list of candidate decisions.

entry.candidate: Candidate plugin ref, or empty string when no direct candidate exists.
entry.confidence: Mapping confidence label such as mapped, same-name, research, or third-party-exception.
entry.last_reviewed: ISO date when this mapping was last checked.
entry.evidence_required: What must be verified in the target environment before accepting the mapping.
entry.note: Short audit note shown in inventory output.

frontend-design@claude-plugins-official.evidence_required: Verify the target Codex installation provides the candidate and compare workflow semantics before replacing the Claude plugin.
frontend-design@claude-plugins-official.note: Prefer Codex official web-app workflow before retaining Claude frontend-design.

superpowers@claude-plugins-official.evidence_required: Verify the target Codex installation provides the candidate and compare skill bodies and triggers before replacing the Claude plugin.
superpowers@claude-plugins-official.note: Same name still requires behavior and trigger comparison.

playwright@claude-plugins-official.evidence_required: Verify browser automation requirements and installed Codex browser capability before replacing the Claude plugin.
playwright@claude-plugins-official.note: Pair with Codex MCP Playwright review when browser automation is needed.

playwright@claude-plugins-official.evidence_required: Verify active Codex MCP registration with codex mcp commands before marking this capability already-present.
playwright@claude-plugins-official.note: Check Codex MCP registration; not a plugin marketplace entry.

mcp-server-dev@claude-plugins-official.evidence_required: Inspect available target developer tooling and confirm it covers MCP server authoring before replacing the Claude plugin.
mcp-server-dev@claude-plugins-official.note: No guaranteed one-to-one equivalent; inspect available OpenAI developer tooling.

mcp-server-dev@claude-plugins-official.evidence_required: Use only when the task is plugin/server evaluation and verify the target plugin exists.
mcp-server-dev@claude-plugins-official.note: Evaluate only if the task is plugin/server evaluation rather than MCP server authoring.

cc@sendbird.evidence_required: Retain only when the user explicitly wants this third-party bridge and the target environment supports it.
cc@sendbird.note: Reverse bridge candidate; retain only with explicit user reason.
